data.name: Toro 7
data.detailed_description:
Toro 7 is a story-focused erotic science fiction game. You play as a security officer who has just been assigned to a deep-sea research station. Upon arrival, you learn that your predecessor died under suspicious circumstances, and it will be up to you to figure out what happened. Was he murdered? And, if so, which of the station's nine inhabitants did it?

You can choose to play as a straight man:


A straight woman:


Or a lesbian woman:


There are three romantically compatible people on the station for each choice, and you can start a sexual relationship with one of them per playthrough. The cast of characters is varied, and each of them has their own backstory and personality. There are multiple explicit sex scenes for each of them.

The game has over 4000 fully rendered 3D images. Playtime is 2-4 hours for the first playthrough, and there is content for 10 different playthroughs (although a substantial amount of content is shared across all playthroughs).

This Game may contain content that is not appropriate for all ages and may not be appropriate for viewing at work. General Mature Content.

The game was written in English and has been human translated to Spanish and French. The other supported languages are machine translated.

Created by long time developers Tlaero (writing and programming) and Mortze (images and sex scenes).

data.short_description: Toro 7 is a story-driven sci-fi mystery where you play a security officer investigating a predecessor’s suspicious death on a deep-sea station. With diverse characters, branching paths, and multiple playthroughs, the game offers a rich, mature narrative experience.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: 64-bit Intel/AMD compatible CPU running at 2.0 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any graphics card that supports OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any modern sound card recognized by the OS
  • VR 支援: n/a
  • 備註: n/a
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: 64-bit Intel/AMD compatible CPU running at 2.0 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any graphics card that supports OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any modern sound card recognized by the OS
  • VR 支援: n/a
  • 備註: n/a

最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.10 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel or Apple Silicon
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
